feedback.text: Hello, i would like you to consider adding the issue of Videogame publishers removing the possiblity to play the games you have bought. As it currently stands, if the game is online only, or is a "game as a service", the publisher is allowed and able to remove the possibility to play said game when the product reached its end of live, which they usually just announce a couple of weeks or months at best, beforehand. This means, even though you have bought it, you cant use the product you paid for anymore.
